sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الشِّعْرُ الْعَرَبِيُّ فَنّاً جَمِيلاً جِدّاً.
sentences.translation: Arapska poezija se smatra veoma lijepom umjetnošću.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic poetry is considered a very beautiful art.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الشُّعَرَاءُ الْكَلِمَاتِ لِرَسْمِ صُوَرٍ رَائِعَةٍ فِي الْخَيَالِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnici koriste riječi kako bi naslikali divne slike u mašti.
sentences.translationEn: Poets use words to paint wonderful images in the imagination.

sentences.translation: Pjesnik uspoređuje plemenitost sa prostranim morem.
sentences.translationEn: The poet compares generosity to the vast sea.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَصِفُ الشَّجَاعَةَ بِأَنَّهَا مِثْلُ الْأَسَدِ الْقَوِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Također opisuje hrabrost kao snažnog lava.
sentences.translationEn: He also describes courage as being like a strong lion.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الِاسْتِعَارَاتُ تَجْعَلُ اللُّغَةَ أَكْثَرَ سِحْراً وَجَمَالاً.
sentences.translation: Ove metafore čine jezik magičnijim i ljepšim.
sentences.translationEn: These metaphors make the language more magical and beautiful.
